refinement_notes.note: Integrate origin/main compact chord typography and three-bar mobile layout while preserving imported MusicXML multi-part loading, form visibility, and full-score accessibility.

history.event: Planner completed plan.json; Supervisor routed website work to Design Agent
Design Agent selected music-visual-instrument and preserved the existing Songs composition; Supervisor routed to Builder
Builder added the form-first song data, MusicXML/MIDI assets, full-score import path, and visible form digest; Supervisor routed to Verifier
Verifier passed lint, typecheck, build, score validation, responsive browser checks, legacy regression, and LAN access; Supervisor routed to Design Critic
Design Critic approved the music-visual-instrument result with no findings; Supervisor routed to Code Critic
Code Critic approved the scoped data and renderer changes; Supervisor marked the run done

Refinement requested for builder: Integrate origin/main compact chord typography and three-bar mobile layout while preserving imported MusicXML multi-part loading, form visibility, and full-score accessibility.
Builder resolved the renderer conflict by preserving imported MusicXML multi-part loading alongside origin/main compact chord formatting and responsive system density.
Verifier passed lint, typecheck, production build, final-score validation, LAN asset checks, desktop/mobile browser checks, and legacy song regression.
Design Critic approved the form-first Music Visual Instrument result with four-measure desktop and readable three-measure mobile systems.
Code Critic approved the merged legacy and imported score paths; Supervisor marked revision 2 done.
